title: White Sheep in the Car
desc: A shepherd rescues a man who has been buried alive by a loan shark for a large reward.
A person with a defect in his memory wipe, wakes up with the realisation that he lost something.

title: Grey Collar
desc: Three identical strangers embark on a journey which leads to dangerous predicament.

title: Destiny
desc: A clock-obsessed man wakes up to a perfect routine, only to be hit by a bus. He awakens again, seconds behind his previous self, facing a relentless loop where he must save himself or repeat his fate.

title: Intezaar
desc: In a part of London with a strong Indian presence, an elderly woman originally from India anxiously awaits word of a community party invitation.

title: The Way We Are
desc: A couple confronts hidden memories, revealing truths to each other and themselves, embarking on a transformative journey of self-discovery.

title: Last Day
desc: A hired killer accepts a contract to eliminate a target, a beautiful woman. He decides to romantically persuade her rather than resort to violence.

title: Aazaar
desc: Representing the mental status carried by the rape victims and their attempt to cope with the aftermath of their trauma and find peace within their personal lives.

title: Fit India
desc: Ganika, a young woman from a middle class Indian family, is dismissed by the prospective grooms and their families that visit her.

title: Baluji
desc: The filmmaker charts the life and music of legendary blind sitar player Baluji Shrivastav.

title: Isolation
desc: A film about isolation, inspired by the Covid lockdown in India in 2020.

title: Iti Rohini
desc: A group of starkly different individuals navigate through various experiences as they discover that love holds the power to make and break lives.

title: Parinaam
desc: A young man is deeply in love with his girlfriend and is living in a romantic bliss. However, the innocent love is quickly replaced with something dark and twisted.

title: Knock Knock
desc: A woman moves into a new apartment and meets her unfriendly neighbour. When the two are forced to cohabitate, they both have to share the ups and downs of their warped relationships.

title: Kati Patang
desc: In a twist of fate, a small-town boy meets a beautiful, mysterious woman and falls head over heels in love. But things soon take an unexpected turn.

title: Meraki
desc: A tale of how artists were coping emotionally through the current circumstances of the world. Eventually they find hope, and it's only their will to create that takes them far in life.

title: Mommy's Sleeping
desc: Ada is charmed by the subtle limit that separates reality and memory, letting the nostalgic memories of her father mix with the simple sound of everyday life.

title: Pushing Daisy
desc: Follows Daisy, an over-zealous business student, as she embarks on her first real-world experience working at Tom's funeral parlour.

title: Highway Nights
desc: With a crippling need to earn a living in a laborious world, an old lorry driver and a young sex worker form an unusual bond as the sun goes down.

title: Aloo Puri
desc: From Kanpur to Delhi, Swati's quest for a groom unfolds with a twist as Shashank tries to defy her prejudices against men from Delhi.

title: Neem Jamun
desc: A young boy and his grandmother go on a journey despite family disapproval.

title: Twisted Sapnay
desc: A stellar star cast with outstanding performances, in a dark comedy with sequences of alternate realities that will leave you spellbound till the end.

title: Madat
desc: A poor old man's life changes drastically one day. He then devises the most humane way to both help his family and punish his assailant non-violently.

title: Evergreen
desc: An award-winning thriller from Malin Barr. A woman and her husband wait for her immigration interview but her thoughts drag her into a world of paranoia.

title: Cybershot
desc: This is Film - Thriller Category.

title: Friday Night
desc: Three rich teenage girls sneak off to paint the town red. When their taxi ends up on the outskirts of town, they not only have to deal with the Indian underclasses, but also with each other.

title: Contrapelo
desc: A proud Mexican barber is forced to make a huge decision as he shaves the leader of a drug cartel.

title: Interstate
desc: When a Homeland Security agent shows up at his door, Joaquin will need to make a tough choice.

title: White Sheep in the Car
desc: A shepherd rescues a man who has been buried alive by a loan shark for a large reward.

title: Bangkok Barcelona On Foot
desc: A heartwarming documentary. Lluis and Jenn discuss their epic journey where they walked over 16,000 km, meeting welcoming and wonderful strangers and locales.

title: Hussain
desc: A moving drama. An office peon yearns to express himself through painting but finds his creativity is thwarted by everyday life.

title: Madhavi
desc: An Indian divorcée confronts her violent past at a lunch with old friends, leading her withdrawn daughter to finally see her strength.

title: The Audition
desc: An actor, waiting for an audition, is approached by a boy who begins to ask him for information. Among strange questions and ambiguous answers, the discussion takes an uncertain turn.

title: Aazaar
desc: Representing the mental status carried by the rape victims and their attempt to cope with the aftermath of their trauma and find peace within their personal lives.

title: Madat
desc: A poor old man's life changes drastically one day. He then devises the most humane way to both help his family and punish his assailant non-violently.

title: Teacher
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: Tiny Matters
desc: When a girl walks out of her house, objects come to life.

title: The Indestructibles
desc: East Germany, 1986. When her sisters flees to West Berlin, a young East German woman is faced with the decision between her family and her own safety.

title: One Last High
desc: An addict has plans to leave town with her girlfriend to live a healthier life but the reality of her addiction affects everything and everyone around her when she thinks she can have one last high.

title: Fireflies - Children Of The Shore
desc: When two children play make-believe games across a stark landscape, they act out a few imaginary grown-up situations before the harsh reality of their legal status is realised.

title: Stingray
desc: Kurt visits his local pet shop to buy a new fish. Here he runs into a young teacher named Lucy and after an argument with a resident stingray decides to ask her out on a date.

title: The Place We Go to Hide
desc: Unaware that they continually fall for each other in their sleep, two sleepwalkers check into the same hotel.

title: Silent Treatment
desc: A man and a woman become interested in each other when they meet in a hospital. As they start interacting through gestures and scribbles, the man discovers that his new friend is aurally impaired.

title: Freeze-Frame
desc: A brave young woman is travelling from Shanghai to London on a top secret mission. She faces unexpected problems when she confuses her bag with a young photographer.

title: Isabel
desc: An estranged couple are brought back together for their daughter's wedding, but the unavoidable presence of their past reopens old wounds, allowing historic mistakes to be renewed.

title: Blue & Malone: Impossible Cases
desc: Berta returns to the theatre her grandmother used to take her to the night before it's demolition.

title: Blue & Malone, Imaginary Detectives
desc: This is Film - Animation Category.

title: Gratification
desc: Alfonso, a workaholic, decides to make his son's birthday special by buying him a special gift. However, numerous complications help him learn the meaning of love.

title: Baatein
desc: Jeet, a documentary filmmaker, visits his deceased friend Milind's mother, Mrs. Deshpande, and also meets Milind's cousin, Tulika. The trio strikes a bond as they share their deepest fears.
